name: Baked Chicken with Apples
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Sliced fresh green beans, French style
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle both sides of chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place chicken on a rack in a shallow open roasting pan.
3. Bake in hot oven (450 degrees) until browned, about 20 minutes.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees.
5. Remove chicken and rack; pour off any fat from the pan.
6. Return chicken to the pan.
7. Dissolve bouillon in boiling water.
8. Pour over chicken along with apple juice.
9. Stir in green beans. Cover and bake for 25 minutes.
10. Stir in apple. Cover and bake for 10 minutes longer.
11. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, mix flour with cinnamon.
12. Blend with 1 tablespoon of cold water.
13. Stir into the hot pan liquid.
14. Cook until the mixture boils and thickens slightly.
15. Serve with chicken and vegetables.
